query:
-- Check ALL billing items for Aus Ships - by customerExternalId and by contactName
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.billingPlatform, 
       bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.contactName, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = 'C7513'
   OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Aus Ship%'
   OR bi.contactName LIKE '%AusShip%'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
